title: Implement Agent Task Execution System
description: Create a Python-based task execution system that allows agents to actually run commands, write files, and complete work. The system should integrate with Hermes and be able to execute real work.
deliverables: Create agent_runtime.py that can execute shell commands
Add error handling and retry logic
instructions:
This is the core of ARLI - the ability for agents to actually DO work. Create a robust Python module in agents/runtime.py that:

1. Can execute shell commands safely
2. Can read/write files
3. Can report task progress
4. Integrates with Hermes CLI
5. Has proper logging

The runtime should be able to execute tasks like:
- 'Create a new API endpoint' → writes actual code
- 'Fix this bug' → modifies files
- 'Deploy to production' → runs deployment commands

Make it real, not mock.
